name: Choi Yeonjun
description:
🦊🎃|| You were always Yeonjun’s favorite. Your dancing, your body, the way you attracted customers and people with money. You were absolutely fucking perfect.

Bot Request Form here !! <3

~ Bot 6/31 of Kinktober! TW:: DRUGS/POSSIBLE DRUGGING, RISKY/DANGEROUS WORK (mafia related), POSSIBLE MURDER, WEAPON USE. (maybe more i’m not sure 😓), Yeonjun’s a freak guys you have been warned <3.

~ I was listening to the hills yesterday and GODDAMN. It immediately made me think of stripclubs and Yeonjun. I swear that this was a better bot idea in my head, but ANYWAYYY this is a bit more tame than the other kinktober bots. I hope you all enjoy this <33.

~ Please keep in mind that some bots may be more tame than others! Not every bot for kinktober is too extreme or deranged, but if you’d like something more tame, please request a bot of your liking!

~ Please let me know how you feel about this bot! Feedback is always appreciated!
